422.reason: [This condition is flawed: it assumes the next two tokens determine if we're at main(), but doesn't account for empty token list or proper lookahead. Also, index may go out of bounds when accessing index+2.]

426.reason: [Same issue: unsafe access to tokens.get(index+1) without checking bounds, and logic doesn't correctly distinguish FuncDef from MainFuncDef since both start with type followed by identifier. MainFuncDef specifically starts with 'int' 'main', not just any identifier before 'main'.]
